name: Guanajuato Silver Company Ltd.
description: Guanajuato Silver Company Ltd. is a junior precious metals producer reactivating past-producing silver and gold mines in central Mexico. The company operates the El Cubo Mines Complex and Valenciana Mines Complex in Guanajuato state, as well as the Topia mine in Durango, producing silver, gold, zinc, and lead concentrates. The company is an active producer and was named to the TSXV Top 50 list in 2025.
